productDisplayName: Baggit Women Bunny Cruise Grey Wallet
description: Worry no longer about managing money, cards and coins in your tote bag! Organise your everyday essentials into this stylish wallet from baggit and drop it into your messy hold-all. This three-fold piece is on the top of our wishlist this year. A sophisticated addition to your accessory collection, you can carry this piece in your hand or pop it into your bag. Dimensions: 21.5 cm x 11.5 cm Crafted from genuine leatheretteetteetteette with a three-fold open style Printed upper with a concealed magnetic closures Printed branding on the front Eight card holders on a detachable flap, one id card holder, one compartment with a zippered separator and a key holder on the left fold One buttoned pocket and three pockets on the centre fold A zippered pocket on the back Care Wipe with clean, damp cloth to remove dirt
